title: Reinforced Wood
description: Similar to the scrapped "Petrified Wood" feature, this mod allows you to reinforce wood, making it fire-resistant!
body:
Similar to the scrapped **"Petrified Wood"** feature, this mod allows you to reinforce wood, making it **fire-resistant**. However, reinforced wood **can only be broken with an axe**.

![Reinforced Wood Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbab0aa78204d4efc1ee8786330f9fc3b1c3cdbc.png)

Reinforced wood can be crafted using **non-reinforced wood and a piece of cobblestone**!

![Crafting Recipe Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d6d9511113d0efab1b92b35df02e37aa9f0ac02.png)

Supported Wood Types: **Oak, Birch, Spruce, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, and Cherry. (currently only planks and wood blocks)**

![Reinforced Wood Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e07ceb06eeb7428281963ae97fbac0bca09fbb96.png)
